prompt: Create a full-body monochrome manga character standing pose on a clean white background: a slim young Japanese male character, unnamed bishonen student, with pale skin, a serious quiet expression, large sharp anime eyes, and glossy black medium-length hair parted near the center with long bangs partly covering one eye. He stands slightly turned in a relaxed upright pose, one hand hanging at his side and the other tucked into his sleeve or pocket area, looking forward with a reserved, melancholy mood. Dress him in a formal traditional Japanese outfit: exactly 5 visible outfit pieces, consisting of a crisp white collared shirt under a dark black kimono-style top with wide sleeves, a wrapped obi belt tied at the front, long gray vertically pleated hakama trousers reaching the ankles, and polished black lace-up leather boots. Use high-detail black-and-white manga line art with delicate hatching, realistic fabric folds, glossy highlights in the hair and shoes, elegant proportions, clean thin outlines, subtle grayscale shading, no color except grayscale, no text, no props, no background scenery, centered composition with ample negative space, fashion character-sheet style.
promptEn: Create a full-body monochrome manga character standing pose on a clean white background: a slim young Japanese male character, unnamed bishonen student, with pale skin, a serious quiet expression, large sharp anime eyes, and glossy black medium-length hair parted near the center with long bangs partly covering one eye. He stands slightly turned in a relaxed upright pose, one hand hanging at his side and the other tucked into his sleeve or pocket area, looking forward with a reserved, melancholy mood. Dress him in a formal traditional Japanese outfit: exactly 5 visible outfit pieces, consisting of a crisp white collared shirt under a dark black kimono-style top with wide sleeves, a wrapped obi belt tied at the front, long gray vertically pleated hakama trousers reaching the ankles, and polished black lace-up leather boots. Use high-detail black-and-white manga line art with delicate hatching, realistic fabric folds, glossy highlights in the hair and shoes, elegant proportions, clean thin outlines, subtle grayscale shading, no color except grayscale, no text, no props, no background scenery, centered composition with ample negative space, fashion character-sheet style.
promptZh: 创作一个全身黑白漫画风格的角色站立姿势，背景为纯白：一位身材苗条的日本年轻男性角色，未命名的美少年学生，皮肤白皙，表情严肃安静，拥有大而锐利的动漫眼睛，以及富有光泽的 黑色 中长发，中分发型，长刘海遮住部分眼睛。他身体微侧，姿态放松且挺拔，一只手垂在身侧，另一只手插在袖口或口袋区域，目视前方，流露出一种内敛忧郁的气质。为他穿上正式的日式传统服装：共 5 件可见的服装部件，包括一件挺括的白色翻领衬衫，外搭一件宽袖黑色和服式上衣，腰间系着裹式腰带，下身穿着长及脚踝的灰色垂直褶皱袴裤，脚蹬擦得锃亮的黑色系带皮靴。采用高细节的黑白漫画线条艺术，带有精致的排线、逼真的布料褶皱、头发和鞋子上的光泽高光、优雅的比例、干净纤细的轮廓线、细腻的灰度阴影，除灰度外无任何颜色，无文字，无道具，无背景景观，居中构图，留白充足，呈现时尚角色设定图风格。
